test.name: Test_heroku_01 : Login success

kw.name: Open heroku website
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Open heroku website

kw.name: Verify login page is displayed
Wait until element is visible with retry
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":true} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Wait until element is visible with retry ${max_attempt} e.g. by default is 3 rounds ${timeout} e.g. by default is 40s
Verify login page is displayed label "Login Page"

kw.name: Login to heroku
Input username
Tap element and input text to element when ready

kw.name: Verify login success popup is displayed
Wait until element is visible with retry
kw.msg: Arguments: [ ${locator}='xpath=//div[@id="flash-messages"]/div[contains(text(),"You logged into a secure area!")]' | ${max_attempt}=3 | ${timeout}='40s' ]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Arguments: [ 'xpath=//div[@id="flash-messages"]/div[contains(text(),"You logged into a secure area!")]' | datetime.timedelta(seconds=40) ]
POST http://localhost:65102/session/a12f00d9921fbad3cbb7bb6906ac7b1f/elements {'using': 'xpath', 'value': '//div[@id="flash-messages"]/div[contains(text(),"You logged into a secure area!")]'}
Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":[]} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '12', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
POST http://localhost:65102/session/a12f00d9921fbad3cbb7bb6906ac7b1f/elements {'using': 'xpath', 'value': '//div[@id="flash-messages"]/div[contains(text(),"You logged into a secure area!")]'}
Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":true} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Wait until element is visible with retry ${max_attempt} e.g. by default is 3 rounds ${timeout} e.g. by default is 40s
Verify login success popup is displayed popup label is "You logged into a secure area!"

kw.msg: Arguments: [ ${locator}='xpath=//div[@id="flash-messages"]/div[contains(text(),"You logged out of the secure area!")]' | ${max_attempt}=3 | ${timeout}='40s' ]

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: To verify that users can login successfully when input a correct username and password.

test.name: Test_heroku_02 : Login failed - password incorrect

kw.name: Verify login password failed popup is displayed

test.doc: To verify that users can login unsuccessfully when they input a correct username but wrong password.

test.name: Test_heroku_03 : Login failed - username not found

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Tap element and input text to element when ready
Input username into username field tomholland e.g. tomsmith

kw.name: Input password
Tap element and input text to element when ready
Wait until element is visible with retry
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":true} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Wait until element is visible with retry ${max_attempt} e.g. by default is 3 rounds 40s e.g. by default is 40s

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Tap element and input text to element when ready
Input password into password field Password! e.g. SuperSecretPassword!

kw.name: Click login button
Tap element when ready
Wait until element is visible with retry
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":true} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Wait until element is visible with retry ${max_attempt} e.g. by default is 3 rounds 40s e.g. by default is 40s

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Tap element when element is ready
Click login button
This feature use for login to heroku in login page ${username} e.g. tomsmith ${password} e.g. SuperSecretPassword!

kw.name: Verify login username failed popup is displayed
Wait until element is visible with retry
kw.msg: Arguments: [ ${locator}='xpath=//div[@id="flash" and contains(text(),"Your username is invalid!")]' | ${max_attempt}=3 | ${timeout}='40s' ]

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Arguments: [ 'xpath=//div[@id="flash" and contains(text(),"Your username is invalid!")]' | datetime.timedelta(seconds=40) ]
POST http://localhost:63961/session/8863a2ad810d48fba07b5a5e439f34de/elements {'using': 'xpath', 'value': '//div[@id="flash" and contains(text(),"Your username is invalid!")]'}
Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":[]} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '12', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
POST http://localhost:63961/session/8863a2ad810d48fba07b5a5e439f34de/elements {'using': 'xpath', 'value': '//div[@id="flash" and contains(text(),"Your username is invalid!")]'}
Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":true} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Wait until element is visible with retry ${max_attempt} e.g. by default is 3 rounds ${timeout} e.g. by default is 40s
Verify login username failed popup is displayed popup label is "Your password is invalid!"

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: To verify that users can login unsuccessfully when they input a username that did not exist.
